\tzpentry{ID3339}{Voxels Number Density Laplacian Operator}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3339 introduces Voxels Number Density Laplacian Operator as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} N_{ \text{voxels}} = \left( \frac{0.1 \text{ m}}{ \Delta r} \right)^3 \approx (5.6 \times 10^5)^3 \approx 1.7 \times 10^{17} \end{equation}
